w:r.w:t: 1. Features Already Available in Existing MVP
End-to-end baggage tracking from check-in to final delivery
Reporting & analytics dashboards with graphs and operational numbers
2. Features Possible for Demo Using Static Data / Metadata / Mock Workflows
Show scan type and scan history using static metadata
The existing web platform UI can be adapted and optimized for mobile responsive compatibility
Show demo baggage tag generation and preview
Show smart tag details as metadata
Show rule-based AI indicators using demo data
Show carousel assignment and ETA using metadata
Implement using company email + SMTP configuration
3. Features Not Feasible as Real Implementations in Demo Environment
Requires airline/DCS systems and external APIs
Requires physical RFID hardware and infrastructure
Requires historical datasets, ML models and live operational feeds
Requires Meta/WhatsApp Business API approvals and integrations
